title: WiseAtlas
subtitle: Showcase your territory
description: A mapping platform to communicate, engage, and showcase your territory on the axes you choose.

hero.title: Wise Atlas
hero.subtitle: Showcase your industries, communicate your vision, and drive your territorial communication strategy

solution.title: A complete platform
solution.subtitle: Everything you need to showcase your territory

interactive.title: Interactive Model
interactive.description: Custom territorial model with networks, land footprints and points of interest. Built-in editor for your agents.

integration3d.title: 3D Integration
integration3d.description: Buildings and factories in 3D directly on the map. Ideal for communicating development projects.

multiActors.title: Multi-stakeholder
multiActors.description: Local authorities, technical services, private companies: each with their own access level and data layer.

showcase.title: Visualize your territory like never before
showcase.subtitle: An intuitive interface for impactful communication

collectivites.title: For local authorities
collectivites.subtitle: A management and communication tool serving your territory
features: Interactive map customized to your brand identity
Import of networks and land footprints

entreprises.title: For businesses
entreprises.subtitle: Your permanent 3D showcase on the official territory map
features: 3D model of your building visible on the map
Integration of tour and recruitment videos

consultation.title: Public consultation
consultation.subtitle: The social acceptability tool for your development projects
consultation.description: Showing an extension in 3D is much less anxiety-inducing for residents than a technical site plan.
features: 3D modeling of the area or neighborhood
Integration of future networks and green spaces
Click on building → video or project PDF

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From defining your focus areas to publishing your map

define.title: Define your axes
define.description: Choose the themes to highlight: economic attractiveness, heritage, tourism, environment…

data.title: Import your data
data.description: Import your data, documents, 3D models and media to enrich your map.

design.title: Customize the experience
design.description: Configure the visual style, filters and navigation paths for your audiences.

publish.title: Publish and share
publish.description: Put your map online and track visitor engagement.

territory.title: Territorial attractiveness
territory.description: Showcase your territory to investors, businesses, or new residents with an interactive showcase.

stakeholders.title: Public consultation
stakeholders.description: Present your development projects to citizens and collect their feedback directly on the map.

infrastructure.title: Project tracking
infrastructure.description: Communicate the progress of your infrastructure or development projects in real time.

editor.title: Built-in editor
editor.description: Create and edit your maps autonomously

action.title: Ready to showcase your territory?
action.subtitle: Request a personalized demo and discover how WiseAtlas can transform your territorial communication.

demo.title: Personalized demo
demo.description: 30 min on your territory or remotely

cta.title: A territorial communication project?
